title: Teacher — Settings & Security
content:
Overview


The Settings page allows teachers to manage their profile, password, and two-factor authentication. It is divided into two sections: Profile and Security.



Profile Settings


The Profile section displays the teacher's account information:


  • Display Name: The name shown on the dashboard, gradebooks, and to students. Click Edit to change it
  • Email Address: The email associated with the account — shows a "Verified" badge. This cannot be changed by the teacher
  • Role: Displays "Teacher" with an "Active" badge

Editing Profile:


  1. Click Edit next to Display Name
  2. Enter a new Display Name
  3. Optionally update Avatar Initials (2 letters) — these appear in the avatar circle throughout the portal
  4. Click Save


Security — Password


Changing Password:


  1. Click Change next to Password
  2. Enter Current Password
  3. Enter New Password (minimum 8 characters)
  4. Enter Confirm New Password
  5. Click Update


Security — Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)


The 2FA section shows whether two-factor authentication is currently enabled or disabled. A button allows the teacher to toggle it.


Enabling 2FA — Step by Step:


  1. Click Enable 2FA
  2. Step 1 — Scan QR Code: A QR code appears. Scan it with Google Authenticator, Authy, or any TOTP app. A manual entry key is displayed below for apps that don't support scanning
  3. Click I've scanned it — Next
  4. Step 2 — Verify: Enter the 6-digit code from the authenticator app. Click Verify & Activate
  5. Step 3 — Backup Codes: After verification, backup codes are displayed. Each code can be used once to bypass 2FA if the authenticator is lost. Teachers should save these codes securely
  6. Click Done — I've saved my codes

Disabling 2FA:


  1. Click Disable 2FA
  2. Enter current password
  3. Enter the 6-digit code from the authenticator app
  4. Click Disable 2FA

If the teacher loses access to their authenticator and has no backup codes, they must contact their school admin or Tklesson support to have 2FA disabled.



Key Talking Points for Agents


  • "You can change your display name anytime — it updates across the whole portal."
  • "Your email address can't be changed from Settings. Contact your school admin if it needs updating."
  • "When setting up 2FA, save your backup codes somewhere safe. They won't be shown again."
  • "If you lose your authenticator app and don't have backup codes, your school admin or our support team can disable 2FA for you."
  • "Avatar initials are just for display — use your initials or any two letters you prefer."
